payload.key_insight: Skyworks reported Mobile segment outperformance for the fourth consecutive quarter driven by 'continued healthy sell-through,' a direct read-through to Apple iPhone demand health, though the guided ~20% sequential Mobile decline in the March quarter aligns with typical post-holiday seasonality rather than signaling incremental weakness. The repeated beat cadence and healthy sell-through language suggest the iPhone supply chain remains constructive heading into Apple's March quarter.
specific_quotes: Mobile exceeded our outlook on the strength of continued healthy sell-through and solid operational execution
We delivered results above our expectations for the fourth consecutive quarter, with outperformance across revenue, gross margin, and non-GAAP earnings
We anticipate Mobile to decline approximately 20% sequentially, consistent with historical seasonality.
